src: A brown dog with a glossy coat, fluffy ears, and expressive eyes. Its tongue is lolling out playfully, with a pink nose, and slightly tousled fur.
edit: A shiny metallic balloon dog in shades of copper with textured folds. It has a glossy black nose, reflective eyes, floppy ears, and a twisted pink balloon tongue sticking out.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: The animal lies on its belly on a log in a wooded area, head turned slightly left, surrounded by blurry trees with bokeh effect, rust-colored leaves and ferns around, creating a forested setting.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: The animal lies with its front paws extended on sandy ground, surrounded by blurred greenery indicating a park or open area with sand and sparse vegetation.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: Animal stands on a pebbly shoreline, with ocean waves at its legs and a sunset sky in the background, creating a beach scene.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: An animal runs through shallow waves with water splashing around its legs, against a distant sea and sunset.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: The animal sits in a field of blooming heather with purple flowers, set against blurred greenery and flowering plants in a natural meadow.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: The animal lies on a snow-dusted log in winter woods, its head turned left, with blurred, frost-coated trees in the background and white snowflakes floating in the air. Icy leaves peek through the snow.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: The animal lies with front paws extended on snow-covered ground, tongue out, surrounded by blurred frost-kissed trees and sparse ice-tipped vegetation, with frost on its fur and snowflakes on its coat.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: An animal stands on a frozen shoreline, with a vast ice canvas behind and a winter sunset sky above, casting a glow across the snow-dusted landscape, creating a tranquil winter setting.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: The animal bounds through light snow, flakes around its legs. The sea stretches under a pale winter sky with soft colors. Frost clings to the sand on the shore, creating a serene wintry seascape.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: The animal resides amid snow-covered heather with purple petals, against a background of a white landscape with frost-kissed greenery and flowering plants, offering a serene winter meadow ambiance.
